column6: Claims most affordable $/cu yd in Denver

column1: Your bundled haul-away is a major value prop. Clients would pay $145-$625 per load if they hired junk removal separately.
A la carte at $300 is right at market average. Denver full-truck loads run $350-$625 from branded companies.
